id_rule: record ID when present, otherwise derived content-addressed path ID, equals <record-class>_<lowercase-sha256-hex>

vectors.schema_contract: retained 05 base plus HCM-2.2 exact additive fields
retained 05 base plus HCM-2.2 exact additive fields
retained 05 base plus HCM-2.2 exact additive fields
retained 05 base plus HCM-2.2 exact additive fields
exact closed runtime shape frozen by HCM-2.2 SPEC and this complete vector
exact closed runtime shape frozen by HCM-2.2 SPEC and this complete vector
exact closed runtime shape frozen by HCM-2.2 SPEC and this complete vector

cross_record_contract.reference_rule: partition path basename without .json equals the exact target expected_id
cross_record_contract.fingerprint_rule: every declared target fingerprint equals target expected_fingerprint
cross_record_contract.target_rule: target record independently recomputes both expected_id and expected_fingerprint from exact fingerprint_preimage bytes
cross_record_contract.external_non_record_refs: definition, profile, policy, canonical-artifact, value, validation-result, prompt-event, and raw evidence refs are outside this content-addressed semantic-record graph

external_reference_contract.rule: every definition, profile, policy, trigger, and published-schema ref in an admitted vector resolves to this exact current producer fingerprint; a stale but self-consistent record refuses
